description.zh-Hans: 生成由均匀分布在圆环上的柔和圆形斑点组成的圆形泼溅图案。适用于装饰性环形图案或印章式泼溅效果。
description.en: Generates a circular splatter composed of soft round blobs arranged evenly on a ring. Useful for decorative ring patterns or stamp-like splatter.

triggers.zh-Hans: 圆形泼溅, 泼溅, 环形装饰, 印章效果
triggers.en: splatter circular, splatter, ring decoration, stamp effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成圆形泼溅图案，用作像素艺术中的装饰性环形或印章效果。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a circular splatter pattern for decorative rings or stamp effects in pixel art.
